input.user_input: Add a choice of law clause to this services agreement. It currently has none. Use Delaware law.

actual:
I would be happy to add a Delaware choice of law clause to your services agreement, but it appears the document has not been uploaded yet. 

If you upload the agreement, I can insert the clause directly into the appropriate section for you. In the meantime, here is a standard Delaware choice of law clause that you can use:

**Governing Law.** This Agreement and all matters arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without giving effect to any conflict of law principles that would require the application of the laws of a different jurisdiction.

Please upload the document if you would like me to edit it directly!
